reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine when Downfall and Dark Tower were first marketed or released.
2. Compare the two years and return the older game.
original_final_question: What is older, Downfall or Dark Tower? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Downfall was first marketed in 1970, while Dark Tower is a 1981 electronic board game, so Downfall is older. -> Downfall
